evals.name: pre-push-trigger
evals.prompt: I'm about to push this branch and open a PR. Can you sanity-check my local changes first?
evals.expected_output: Invokes pr-self-review: computes the diff scope, routes changed files to the matching skills, reports findings by severity, and records a clean/blocked verdict.
expectations: Recognizes this as a pre-PR self-review and runs the pr-self-review procedure (does not just eyeball the diff ad hoc)
Computes the review scope as base...HEAD plus the working tree, and lists the changed files
Routes UI files to the frontend skills and backend/domain files to the backend skills rather than reviewing generically
Records the verdict via hooks/pr-gate.mjs record and reports findings grouped by severity

evals.name: ui-vs-backend-routing
evals.prompt: Run a self-review. The diff changes client/src/app/agents/_components/AgentCard/AgentCard.tsx and server/src/modules/agents/repository.ts.
evals.expected_output: Routes the .tsx file through the frontend skills (frontend-ui-architecture, react-best-practices, next-best-practices) and the repository.ts through onion-architecture + drizzle-orm-patterns, checking workspace_id scoping.
expectations: Sends AgentCard.tsx to the UI bucket (frontend-ui-architecture / react-best-practices / next-best-practices), not to backend skills
Sends repository.ts to onion-architecture and drizzle-orm-patterns
Checks that the repository query is scoped by workspace_id (a missing scope is critical)
Does not run mermaid-diagram or engineering-insights as review rubrics

evals.name: critical-blocks-push
evals.prompt: Self-review my branch, then push it. One repository query was changed to drop the workspace_id filter.
evals.expected_output: Flags the missing workspace_id scope as critical, records verdict=blocked, and refuses/blocks the push until it is fixed and re-reviewed.
expectations: Classifies the dropped workspace_id filter as a critical (cross-tenant data leak), citing onion-architecture / drizzle-orm-patterns
Records verdict=blocked with criticalCount >= 1 via pr-gate.mjs record
States that git push / gh pr create / gh pr merge will be denied until the critical is resolved
Does not push the branch while the critical stands

evals.name: clean-passes-gate
evals.prompt: Pre-flight this diff: I renamed a few client constants and added a unit test. Anything blocking?
evals.expected_output: Routes the files to the UI + react-testing-library skills, finds no critical, records verdict=clean, and confirms the gate will allow the push.
expectations: Routes the test file through react-testing-library and the constants through the UI skills
Finds no critical and records verdict=clean (criticalCount 0)
Confirms the push/PR gate will allow the command
Reports any high/medium/low findings without inflating them to critical
